name: node-string-width
title: node-string-width
summary: Get the visual width of a string
description:
Get the visual width of a string
Some Unicode characters use more or less than the normal width when output
to the command-line.
.
This nodejs module gets the visual width of a string i.e. the actual
number of columns required to display it.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-string-width because Get the visual width of a string.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-string-width as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-string-width with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-string-width --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
